Video.summary: Felicia is done playing sugar mama for her younger boyfriend, Tyler: she wants the money she's owed for his repossessed truck.
Video.title: Mallett vs. Silas

Video.summary: Thirteen years and 20 breakups later, Lakeia and Shundric leave the fate of their relationship up to a compatibility test.
Video.title: White vs. Loyd

Video.summary: Married couple Jovan and Rosalyn feud over a shredded sofa, a broken TV and a dead plant.
Video.title: Johnson vs. Johnson

Video.summary: Accusations of emotional abuse and infidelity bring an Illinois couple to court.
Video.title: Walton vs. Hamilton

Video.summary: A devastating revelation proves that love truly is blind in Sharise and Edson's relationship.
Video.title: Bowie vs. Segarra

Video.summary: Accusations of betrayal threaten their future as Christopher and Michelle seek to determine the fate of their family and home.
Video.title: Gore vs. Sherman

Video.summary: A boyfriend and girlfriend go head-to-head in court over a discarded promise ring and a broken camera.
Video.title: White vs. Mitchell

Video.summary: The Stallworths bring their relational issues to the Cutlers in a last ditch effort to save their marriage.
Video.title: Stallworth vs Stallworth

Video.summary: Past infidelity has a girlfriend and boyfriend at odds over the paternity of their child.
Video.title: Ogletree vs. Lockhart

Video.summary: Breanna and Jonathan face a relationship crossroads, navigating trust, age gaps and uncertain futures in their complicated polyamorous love life.
Video.title: Minor vs. Sanders

Video.summary: Clashing personalities have an entrepreneurial couple butting heads in their business ventures.
Video.title: Tunstall vs. Moody

Video.summary: Irma demands a refund for the party bus she rented from LaToya, stating it wasn't decorated properly.
Video.title: Unhappy Birthday Party

Video.summary: A blind rapper brings his wife to court with an ultimatum: to drop her maiden name and take his last name.
Video.title: Nelson vs. Crowe

Video.summary: Ownership of music rights brings former business partners and lovers to court.
Video.title: Curtis vs. Garland

Video.summary: Shocking results of a paternity test will make or break Josh and Shaneka's 10-year relationship.
Video.title: Kellam vs. Bigby

Video.summary: A Texas man suspects his girlfriend of cheating with the father of her children.
Video.title: Hicks vs. Rodriguez

Video.summary: Erica is bringing Isaiah to court under allegations of stealing money intended for medical purposes to rent a party bus.
Video.title: Hendrickson vs. Bennett

Video.summary: A dramatic dispute over infidelity, fatherhood and responsibility puts a fragile relationship to the ultimate test.
Video.title: Cobb vs. Harper

Video.summary: Eric is ready to marry Mazii, but she doesn't trust him; the Cutlers help them through their trust and communication issues.
Video.title: Monét vs. Martin

Video.summary: Secret social accounts and suspicious behavior have Kashmir asking the Cutlers if this relationship can be saved.
Video.title: Thornton vs Jones

Video.summary: Christina is suing someone she's known for 8 years over money she claims he owes her for a French bulldog.
Video.title: You Stole My Dog!

Video.summary: Aisha McNeil says the defendant was like a brother to her and she’s finding it so hard to have to sue him, but, hey, he owes her a lot of money. He promised to pay her back but he hasn’t. Darren Thomas says he and the plaintiff were friends and he helped her out by paying her bills, paying for dinners, drinks, you name it. One day, she gives him an iPhone 6 as a present then turns around and tells the cops he stole it from her, defaming hi character and causing him to lose business. He’s accused of not phoning it in.
Video.title: Not Phoning It In

Video.summary: Florence sues Lora, claiming the puppy she bought from her shop, Harley, was sick and cost $1,600 in vet bills. Lora insists the puppy was healthy at sale and denies responsibility for its condition after four months.
Video.title: You Sold Me a Sick Dog!

Image.alt: You Sold Me a Sick Dog!
You Sold Me a Sick Dog!
You Sold Me a Sick Dog!

Video.summary: Anissa Williams sues her dad, Nathaniel Green, for $5,000, claiming he owes her money despite the heartbreak. Nathaniel argues the money was family kindness and countersues for $1,000 for slander.
Video.title: Abandoned by Her Father

Video.summary: Viktoriya claims her neighbor Mario's dog damaged her $730 coat by ripping its sleeve. She’s suing for the cost, calling him irresponsible. Mario counters, alleging Viktoriya taunted his dog and provoked the incident.
Video.title: Neighbors at War

Video.summary: Christopher is sued by his mother for parking tickets after being unable to forgive her for choosing drugs.
Video.title: Parking Tickets and Past Troubles

Video.summary: A man says he dated the defendant for 20 years, and they have a child together, but now that he's married, the defendant has become extremely jealous of his new relationship; he sues for breach of contract, an electric bill and emotional distress.
Video.title: Love, Lies, and Legal Ties

Video.summary: Amanda is suing her nail tech Jonyell after paying her to take a nail class but she breached their contract.
Video.title: Getting Nailed for Class Tuition

Video.summary: Plaintiff rented a room from the defendant; he's suing for the return of his security deposit.
Video.title: Room for Rent

Video.summary: The plaintiff says her sister tried to push her out of a car and strangle her with a seat belt.
Video.title: Sibling Rivalry

Video.summary: Jeretha is petitioning the court for a DNA test to be given to a woman she thinks is her sister.
Video.title: From Strangers to Sisters

Video.summary: Derek is suing for breach of contract after claiming the female dancers he ordered were on their phones.
Video.title: Dance Party Full of Missteps

Video.summary: Alexa is suing her boyfriend for abruptly canceling a trip of a lifetime because she needed to bring her kid.
Video.title: Adults only

Video.summary: Ariana Garcia, 19, is suing her parents for refusal to acknowledge and respect her privacy and boundaries.
Video.title: Baby Blues

Video.summary: Jonah sues ex-friend Elliot for $25,000, defamation, and IP theft, aiming to disband "The Wizarding Warband." Elliot disputes, blaming Jonah's leadership for league decline.
Video.title: Battle Royale

Video.summary: Guillermo Logan sues Nancy Grant for $5M, alleging false imprisonment and mental anguish after getting trapped by her security system during a burglary. Nancy defends her system due to past burglaries and questions Guillermo's criminal history.
Video.title: Caught in the Act

Video.summary: Erica Green is suing her ex-trainer Susan White for emotional distress and fraud, seeking $15,000. Erica reached her goal weight in 2019 but gained 30 pounds during Covid. She signed up for Susan's "Waist Away" program with a weight loss guarantee but gained 25 pounds. Susan blames Erica's non-commitment and countersues for defamation, seeking $25,000. Erica's current trainer, Mark, regrets taking her as a client, as she fired him and he witnessed her unhealthy eating habits.
Video.title: Waisting Away

Video.summary: Chris sues ex-wife Lisa for $10K, citing emotional distress and property damage. He says Lisa punctured his emotional support doll, "Dolly." Lisa denies it, blaming Chris's objectophilia and claiming Dolly deflated when he sat on it.
Video.title: Deflated Love

Video.summary: Giselle is suing her father for Emotional Distress and $145,000 for the cost of canceling her wedding.
Video.title: Daddy Dearest

Video.summary: Miguel is suing his ex-girlfriend for the entire $5 million which she won via a scratch-off ticket.
Video.title: Tickets to lies

Video.summary: Evelyn sues Dexter for $500K, saying he tricked her into leaving her marriage, causing financial ruin and distress. Dexter denies, saying she pursued him as a gold digger.
Video.title: For Love or Money

Video.summary: Barbara sues Emilio's strip club for $30,000, alleging negligence and emotional distress. She claims whiplash from Jackson's performance and a collapsing chair. Emilio denies responsibility, citing safety and Barbara's drinking.
Video.title: Tornado Tassel

Video.summary: The Wilsons sue Sean Moore, Ballpark Bandits sponsor, for $10,000. Their son got fired mid-season, Sean blames Kevin's erratic behavior and Laurie for fostering negativity and intimidating parents.
Video.title: Little League, Big Problems

Video.summary: Daniel sues Jeremy for $800,000, alleging copyright infringement over "Nightshade Ninja" costume copied as "Shadow Shogun." Jeremy denies, claims originality, forgives Daniel for reputation damage.
Video.title: The Hero-Con

Video.summary: Mario is suing the neighborhood psychic, Lydia, after promising to remove his curse...for a fee.
Video.title: Psychic promises

Video.summary: Wilbur and his wife are suing his sister, Jennifer, after their son was left out of their grandmother's will.
Video.title: Will-fully Repugnant

Video.summary: Michelle is suing Michael and Nuri for negligence and business loss after her high-end spa was damaged.
Video.title: Piglet Parade
